name: Progenesis
explicitMods: 20% reduced Charges per use
11% increased Duration
When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. Burning enemies are dealt more damage. If you hit an ignited enemy, will create burning ground under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.

Deals 832 to 1247 Fire Damage
108% more Damage with Hits against Burning enemies
Cannot Ignite

Hits on Ignited Enemies create Burning Ground, no more than once every 2 seconds
Burning Ground deals 25% of Fire Damage per second of Ignite affecting Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, AoE, Melee, Movement, Travel, Slam

socketedItems.secDescrText: Jump through the air, damaging and knocking back enemies with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way. Requires an Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Sword or Staff.

+0.55 seconds to Attack Time
Base radius is 1.5 metres
Damaging Hits always Stun Enemies that are on Full Life

Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 180% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Spells Sacrifice a random nearby Damageable Minion on Cast to gain added Physical Damage equal to 2.4% of Sacrificed Minion's Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 76% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
